title: Fully realized CI/CD on main
description:
Green superrepo workflows: setup-beskid-web composite, trudoc verify via web workspace, nexus Docker/native smoke, security audits, and verify-all-on-main evidence after v0.4 landings.

## Provenance
- **Catalog cutoff:** [`aaddd32`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/aaddd32) → [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) on **beskid** (2026-05-26 – 2026-05-27)
- **Anchor commit:** [`1b0a15c`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/1b0a15c)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Status:** Partial — web CI, nexus smoke, and lazygit landed; verify-all-on-main backlog
- **Workstreams:** `repo-cicd`, `nexus`
